records.summary: This is a typed coronary angiography report for a 65-year-old female patient. The report details the procedure (emergency, via right radial artery), hemodynamic data, and findings including 100% occlusion of the left anterior descending artery (LAD). The final impression is ACS-AWSTEMI with severe LV dysfunction and cardiogenic shock, recommending PAMI to LAD.
key_observations: Patient is 65 years old, female, undergoing emergency coronary angiography.
LAD has 100% mid-segment occlusion.
Final diagnosis includes ACS-AWSTEMI, severe LV dysfunction, cardiogenic shock, and CAD-SVD.
Recommendation is PAMI to LAD.
Procedure performed via right radial artery using a 5F Tiger catheter.
